Title: Rice bran derivatives alleviate microglia activation: possible involvement of MAPK pathway

Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Induced in primary microglia after LPS stimulation
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Rice bran extract reduces COX-2 expression, associated with decreased PGE2 production in activated microglia
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Western blot; qRT-PCR; PGE2 enzyme immunoassay under LPS activation with RBE pretreatment
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: LPS stimulation; rice bran extract pretreatment
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. LPS strongly induced COX-2 in rat primary microglia. 2. Rice bran extract significantly reduced COX-2 protein expression at 100–300 μg/ml. 3. Reduced COX-2 expression paralleled suppression of PGE2 release.
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Although PTGS2 is an enzyme in PGE2 biosynthesis, in this paper it is measured mainly as an inflammatory effector/marker rather than a plant nutrient-metabolism engineering target.

Common_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: MAPEG family; microsomal prostaglandin E synthase-1
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Induced in primary microglia after LPS stimulation
Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Pro-inflammatory mediator involved in microglial activation and neuroinflammation
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Rice bran extract reduces mPGES-1 expression, associated with decreased PGE2 production in activated microglia
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Western blot; qRT-PCR; PGE2 enzyme immunoassay under LPS activation with RBE pretreatment
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: LPS stimulation; rice bran extract pretreatment
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. LPS induced mPGES-1 expression in primary rat microglia. 2. Rice bran extract significantly reduced mPGES-1 protein expression from 50 μg/ml onward. 3. mPGES-1 downregulation accompanied suppression of PGE2 release.
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Although PTGES is a pathway enzyme for PGE2 production, in this paper it is analyzed in a mammalian inflammation context, not crop nutrient metabolism.

Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Strongly induced by LPS in primary microglia
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Strongly induced in LPS-activated primary microglia; reduced by RBE
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Rice bran extract decreases TNF-α gene expression and release in activated microglia
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: LPS stimulation; rice bran extract pretreatment
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. TNF-α expression and release were strongly induced by LPS. 2. Rice bran extract significantly suppressed TNF-α mRNA and secreted protein. 3. Reduction is consistent with anti-inflammatory action of RBE via MAPK modulation.
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Cytokine marker, not a nutrient metabolism gene.

Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Strongly induced by LPS in primary microglia
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Strongly induced in LPS-activated primary microglia; reduced by RBE
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Rice bran extract decreases IL-1β gene expression and release in activated microglia
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR; ELISA with ATP co-stimulation for release
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: LPS stimulation; ATP added for IL-1β release assay; rice bran extract pretreatment
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. LPS induced IL-1β expression in primary rat microglia. 2. Rice bran extract reduced IL-1β mRNA at higher concentrations and lowered released IL-1β. 3. ATP was required to trigger measurable IL-1β release.
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Cytokine marker, not a nutrient metabolism gene.

Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Induced after LPS and further enhanced by RBE in primary microglia
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Enhanced in RBE-treated LPS-activated primary microglia
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Rice bran extract enhances IL-10 gene expression in activated microglia
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: LPS stimulation; rice bran extract pretreatment
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. IL-10 was used as an anti-inflammatory/M2 marker in microglia. 2. Rice bran extract increased IL-10 mRNA from 50 μg/ml onward. 3. This supports an anti-inflammatory shift in activated microglia.
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Cytokine marker, not a nutrient metabolism gene.

Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Inflammatory mediator biosynthesis and cytokine production linked to PGE2 synthesis
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Activation of p38 MAPK supports induction of COX-2/mPGES-1 and pro-inflammatory mediators; RBE suppresses p38 phosphorylation
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Key controller of inflammatory PGE2 production in activated microglia
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Present in primary microglia; activated by LPS
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Phosphorylated rapidly after LPS; phosphorylation reduced by RBE
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: RBE inhibits p38 activation, contributing to lower COX-2/mPGES-1 expression and reduced PGE2 production
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Western blot of phospho-p38 under LPS activation with RBE pretreatment
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: LPS stimulation; rice bran extract pretreatment
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. LPS activated p38 MAPK in primary microglia. 2. RBE significantly reduced p38 phosphorylation from 50 μg/ml onward. 3. This inhibition is linked to reduced inflammatory mediator production.
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Mammalian signaling gene; not a crop nutrient metabolism regulator.

Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Inflammatory mediator biosynthesis and cytokine production linked to PGE2 synthesis
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: ERK1/2 activation contributes to inflammatory enzyme induction; RBE modestly suppresses ERK1/2 phosphorylation
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Contributory controller of inflammatory PGE2 production
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Present in primary microglia; activated by LPS
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Phosphorylated after LPS; significantly reduced only at highest RBE concentration
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: RBE modestly inhibits ERK1/2 activation, potentially contributing to reduced PGE2 pathway enzyme expression
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Western blot of phospho-ERK1/2 under LPS activation with RBE pretreatment
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: LPS stimulation; rice bran extract pretreatment
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. LPS activated ERK1/2 in primary microglia. 2. RBE significantly reduced ERK1/2 phosphorylation only at 300 μg/ml. 3. ERK inhibition was weaker than p38 and JNK inhibition.
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Mammalian signaling gene; not a crop nutrient metabolism regulator.

Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Inflammatory mediator biosynthesis and cytokine production linked to PGE2 synthesis
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: JNK activation contributes to induction of inflammatory genes; RBE suppresses JNK phosphorylation
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Important controller of inflammatory mediator production in activated microglia
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Present in primary microglia; activated by LPS
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Phosphorylated after LPS; reduced by RBE at 200–300 μg/ml
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: RBE inhibits JNK activation, contributing to lower inflammatory gene expression and PGE2 production
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Western blot of phospho-JNK under LPS activation with RBE pretreatment
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: LPS stimulation; rice bran extract pretreatment
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. LPS activated JNK in primary microglia. 2. RBE significantly reduced JNK phosphorylation at 200–300 μg/ml. 3. JNK inhibition paralleled suppression of inflammatory responses.
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Mammalian signaling gene; not a crop nutrient metabolism regulator.
